name: Seafood Enchilada Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl stir together soup, onion, nutmeg and black pepper.
2. In another bowl, place half of the soup mixture, drained spinach, crab and 1 cup of the Monterey Jack cheese; set aside.
3. Wrap the tortillas in paper towels; microwave on 100% power for 30-60 seconds.
4. Place 1/3 cup mixture on each tortilla; roll up.
5. Place seam side down in a greased 12 x 7 1/2 dish.
6. Stir milk into the reserved soup mixture, pour over enchiladas.
7. Cook, covered, on high for 12-14 minutes.
8. Sprinkle with the remaining cheese.
9. Let stand for 10 minutes.
10. Add a dash of hot pepper sauce to soup mix if desired.
